events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Insufficient concrete cover — rebar touching formwork or ground, violating minimum cover requirements",
    "Rebar in contact with forms/ground is susceptible to corrosion and will not achieve designed bond or fire-rating performance",
    "Chair/spacer supports appear missing or inadequate, allowing bars to rest directly on subgrade or form face"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt concrete placement until cover deficiency is corrected",
    "Install or replace bar supports (chairs, bolsters, spacers) at proper spacing to maintain specified clear cover",
    "Verify cover against ACI 318 Table 20.6.1.3.1 and ACI 117 tolerances for the applicable exposure class and element type",
    "Re-inspect rebar placement after corrections and document cover measurements before closing out the work"
  ],
  "rationale": "Rebar touching formwork or ground provides zero clear cover, which is below the minimum cover required by ACI 318 for any exposure condition and outside the tolerances in ACI 117. This compromises durability, corrosion protection, bond development, and structural performance. The work is non-compliant and must be corrected before concrete placement proceeds.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 318 Chapter 20 — concrete cover requirements",
    "ACI 318 Table 20.6.1.3.1 — minimum cover for cast-in-place concrete",
    "ACI 117 — tolerances for concrete construction and materials, cover tolerances",
    "Placing drawings — specified bar positions and cover dimensions"
  ]
}
